remaining_annotations.text: Node.js 20 is deprecated. Actions target node20 but are being forced to run on node24.
remaining_annotations.permanent_fix: Action maintainers update action.yml runs.using to node24. GitHub cutover June 2 2026.

vercel_preview_build_fix.root_cause: auth.ts:32 called readJwtSecret() at module initialization time. next build 'Collecting page data' phase executed module-level code and threw JWT_SECRET environment variable is required. Vercel preview builds do not have JWT_SECRET set at build time.
vercel_preview_build_fix.fix: Made SECRET lazy — getSecret() function computes it on first request, not at import time. Zero behaviour change at runtime.
vercel_preview_build_fix.local_build_without_jwt_secret: PASS — 37 static pages generated, all routes collected
vercel_preview_build_fix.local_build_with_jwt_secret: PASS — confirmed in CI (generates JWT_SECRET before build step)

real_mobile.reason: Sandbox cannot access real mobile device.

options_attempted.detail: auth.ts lazy-SECRET fix committed. Previous PR #3 Vercel deploy FAILED (JWT_SECRET not set at build time). After push, Vercel should redeploy without this error. Inspector: https://vercel.com/celebimehmethanifi-creators-projects/web/6R9GtEe3BfKFuL4pFvfcKi3jhSEG
Requires physical Windows PC C:\Users\mhani\Desktop\NEURA and real mobile on same Wi-Fi.

classification_rules.PASS: iOS Safari + iOS or Android Chrome, all visual checks pass
classification_rules.PARTIAL_REAL_DEVICE_EVIDENCE: iOS Safari only, all visual checks pass

required_to_pass: At minimum: real iOS Safari screenshots
Preferred: iOS Safari + iOS Chrome or Android Chrome
Pages: Dashboard, Market, Asset detail modal, Alarms, Performance, Social
All visual checks pass (no overlap, no overflow, no fake live claims)

production.vercel_preview_deploy: Was FAILED. Root cause fixed (lazy SECRET). Awaiting Vercel redeploy after push. Inspector: https://vercel.com/celebimehmethanifi-creators-projects/web/6R9GtEe3BfKFuL4pFvfcKi3jhSEG
production.root_cause: Vercel CLI deploy does not inject VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA/REF. All version-info.ts fields fall to CLI_FALLBACK.
production.fix_option_a: Enable Vercel Git integration → auto-injects VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA, VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF, VERCEL_DEPLOYMENT_ID, VERCEL_URL
production.fix_option_b: Set AYC_COMMIT_SHA, AYC_BRANCH, AYC_BUILD_TIME, AYC_DEPLOYMENT_ID, AYC_DEPLOYMENT_URL in Vercel dashboard before CLI deploy
production.required_to_pass: aycmarket.com/api/v1/version must return traceabilityComplete:true with real commitSha/branch
production.sandbox_constraint: Cannot access Vercel dashboard or run production deploy

open_issues.issue: CI: 4 node20→24 informational annotations. FORCE flag applied. Permanent fix: action maintainers update action.yml.
Vercel preview build crash: auth.ts module-level readJwtSecret() threw when JWT_SECRET unset. Fixed: lazy getSecret() — JWT_SECRET only read at request time.
REAL_MOBILE_PASS: NOT_RUN — Vercel preview fix pushed; awaiting redeploy. LAN fallback requires Windows PC. Manual steps in test-results/screenshots/phase3-real-mobile-smoke/MANUAL_STEPS.md
PROD_PASS: FAIL — not_provided_by_cli_deploy. Fix: Vercel Git integration or AYC_* env vars in Vercel dashboard.
